financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well financially, especially because of its successful business in India.
They are handling their debts wisely and have a solid plan for future investments.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well, but higher tariffs are making it harder to sell aluminum in North America.
A recent safety incident in India shows there are still risks, but the company is working to fix these issues.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well in protecting the environment, which boosts its overall score.
There is room for improvement in how the company treats people and manages its leadership.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company leaders are very confident about their plans and financial strength.
They are also careful about outside issues like tariffs and market changes.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company shared some clear numbers about costs, which is good.
However, they were not very clear about future plans, making it hard to understand what's next.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is working hard to grow by cutting costs and expanding its ability to produce more.
Even though there are challenges, the company is being careful and planning for the future.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Hindalco is doing well because it made a lot more money this year and is cutting costs to save even more.
Even though there are some challenges, the company is investing in growth and has a strong financial base to support its plans.
